message.content:
Explore the navigation and design patterns in the CitedBy.ai app at C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test - Test Copie. I need to understand:

1. How App.tsx handles navigation (currentView state, sidebar)
2. How other pages with internal tabs/navigation handle them (e.g., Projects.tsx with its renderTabsBar, Recharge.tsx with viewMode)
3. The common design patterns: ninja-card class, gradient styles, rounded-2xl, border-white/[0.08], etc.
4. How the sidebar menu item "Compte & Plan" navigates to Account.tsx
5. What props Account.tsx receives from App.tsx

Check App.tsx, the sidebar code, Projects.tsx tabs pattern, and Recharge.tsx viewMode pattern. Give a thorough summary.

content.text: I'll explore the CitedBy.ai app structure to understand the navigation patterns and design system. Let me start by mapping the project structure and then examining the key files.
